response.original_title: Green: The Fight for Rock and Roll
response.overview: Wayne Green is a rock singer who has stood on the precipice of wide-scale success not once, but three times; on his 70th birthday he takes on a project that is the culmination of his life's work, but the same demons that have undermined him in the past come to rear their ugly heads once again.
response.tagline: Wayne Green has teetered on the brink of fame not once, but three times.
response.title: Green: The Fight for Rock and Roll
